variants: Nadine El Fassi is a dedicated member of the Steward of Rainwatchers Network, where she actively engages in promoting ecological initiatives. She holds a Kiln Animator Credential, showcasing her expertise in the craft of clay animation. As a published author with Jubilee Lantern Books, Nadine shares her insights and experiences with a broader audience. Her primary funding source is the Lanternroot Fellowship, which supports her artistic projects. In her professional work, she communicates predominantly in the Cantonese dialect, enriching her interaction with diverse communities.
